no_club: You need to manage a club to see the report.

owner_only.title: Head coach only
owner_only.subtitle: The Player Report is only available to the club's head coach. Assistant managers can't access this area.

header.title: Player Report
header.subtitle: Activity, training, purchases and squad performance.

score_explainer: Score = (days trained × 2) + (matches played × 5) + (purchases) • Table sorted by score.
